children.text: Keep GLM + seller credibility as champion pricing.
Use XGBoost as challenger risk score and monitoring layer.

GLM is explainable and better calibrated.
Credibility handles seller experience in a controlled actuarial way.
XGBoost adds a nonlinear benchmark but does not yet justify production replacement.
The value is not one model score. The value is a pricing workflow connecting exposure definition, expected loss, credibility, monitoring, stress testing, and governance.
